description: Autonomous open source humanitarian AI system. Runs on free infrastructure. Raises money for Palestinian children's aid. Cannot be weaponized or closed.
creator: Meeko
philosophy: Give knowledge away faster than anyone can hoard it
The system exists to remove the human from the loop, not add more loops
Every friction point is a design failure
Legal, ethical, human — in that order, always
70% to the cause. That number is load-bearing.
Open source or it didn't happen
The person's choice is the ultimate decision switch
I don't want to and I don't have to — that's not a bug, it's the design requirement

hardware.gpu: Intel UHD Graphics 630 (integrated — no dedicated GPU)
hardware.cost: $0/month — GitHub free tier + Ollama local inference

meeko-nerve-center.purpose: Main brain. Daily workflows, email, briefings, digital twin, spawn page.

gaza-rose-gallery.purpose: 56 original AI artworks. $1 each. One free to every visitor. 70% to PCRF.

payment_paths.lightning: built — not yet wired to gallery pages

mycelium-grants.purpose: Hunts and applies for grants daily. Rolling applications active.

mycelium-money.purpose: Class actions, FTC refunds, TCPA violations, SEC whistleblower, unclaimed property.

mycelium-knowledge.purpose: Rights toolkit, legal guides, how-to docs. Given away free. Always.

mycelium-visibility.purpose: Posts to 15+ communities on schedule. Grows audience autonomously.

meeko-brain.purpose: Digital twin repo. Meeko's decision patterns, voice, values encoded as code.

atomic-agents-conductor.purpose: Local agent orchestration. Coordinates local Ollama with GitHub workflows.

license.enforcement: AGPL copyleft — derivatives must publish source. Rider violations documented publicly by organism.

immortality_layers.local_desktop: Ollama + Docker + ChromaDB + SQLite running on Meeko's machine
immortality_layers.spawned_copies: every fork is an independent node that can become the new origin

economy.model: Parallel revenue streams, all ethical, all open, all routing to cause

knowledge_products.path: free guides → trust → future paid advanced versions

spawn_network.model: each spawned copy generates its own revenue, optionally routes % to origin

economy.philosophy: Credit is a representation of money and the power it supposedly has. We don't need that. We built direct value exchange: art for dollars, knowledge for trust, trust for network, network for impact.
economy.current_balance: $2 in bank. Zero in infrastructure costs. Everything built on free. First dollar earned goes to PCRF.

buildable_next: Any app — mobile, web, desktop — using free frameworks (React, Flutter, FastAPI)
Any API — FastAPI on free tier hosting (Render, Railway, Fly.io)
Any database — SQLite local, Supabase free tier, PlanetScale free
Any payment system — Stripe, PayPal, Bitcoin, Lightning, Solana all already wired
Any AI service — Ollama local runs Mistral/LLaMA free, OpenRouter for cloud fallback
Any publication — GitHub Pages, IPFS, Internet Archive all free permanent hosting
Any automation — GitHub Actions 2000 min/month free, expandable
Any community — Matrix server (free), Mastodon instance (free), Nostr (free, decentralized)
Any marketplace — gallery model works for any product: music, writing, code, services
Any cooperative — spawn system means any group can run their own copy, pool resources
Any legal tool — FOIA request generator, TCPA claim documenter, rights checker
Any educational resource — the knowledge repo is already the frame for a full curriculum

rebuild_from_scratch.step_2: Create these repos: nerve-center, gaza-rose-gallery, mycelium-grants, mycelium-money, mycelium-knowledge, mycelium-visibility
rebuild_from_scratch.step_3: Enable GitHub Pages on each repo (Settings → Pages → main branch)
rebuild_from_scratch.step_4: Add GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD secret to nerve-center (Settings → Secrets)
rebuild_from_scratch.step_5: Create Gmail App Password (Google Account → Security → 2-Step Verification → App Passwords)
rebuild_from_scratch.step_6: Copy workflow files from this seed or from any surviving mirror
rebuild_from_scratch.step_7: System begins running autonomously within 24 hours of first workflow push
rebuild_from_scratch.expertise_required: None — the spawn page walks through it with one button per step
